name: Medium Draft Publisher
description: Creates draft posts on Medium using the Medium API. Verifies the integration token and authenticated user, then creates a draft (or optionally public/unlisted) post on the user's profile or under a publication. Supports Markdown or HTML content, tags, and a canonical URL. Requires a Medium integration token (medium.com/me/settings).
author: custom

input.hint: Generate one at https://medium.com/me/settings under 'Integration tokens'. Treat it like a password.

examples.prompt: Verify my Medium token and show my account
Create a Medium draft titled 'Hello World' with the body 'My first draft.'
Draft a Medium post titled 'Async in Node' in markdown tagged nodejs, javascript
examples.call: {"action": "draft", "title": "Async in Node", "content": "# Async in Node\n\nEvent loop notes...", "contentFormat": "markdown", "tags": "nodejs, javascript", "canonicalUrl": "", "publishStatus": "draft", "publicationId": ""}

examples.prompt: Save an HTML draft titled 'Release Notes' with a canonical URL to my blog

action.description: Action to perform: 'me' (verify the token and return the authenticated user) or 'draft' (create a post, draft by default).

title.description: The post title. Required for action 'draft'. Used for SEO/listings; include it in 'content' too if you want it to appear in the post body. Titles longer than 100 characters are ignored by Medium.

content.description: The post body. Required for action 'draft'. Interpreted according to 'contentFormat' (Markdown or HTML).

tags.description: Optional tags as a comma-separated string (e.g. 'nodejs, javascript') or an array. Only the first 3 are used by Medium; tags over 25 characters are ignored.

canonicalUrl.description: Optional original URL of this content if it was first published elsewhere.

publicationId.description: Optional publication ID to create the post under a publication instead of the user's profile.
